builds_on.name: Group Relative Policy Optimization
builds_on.evidence: employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) (Shao et al., 2024) as our RL framework

builds_on.name: supervised fine-tuning
builds_on.evidence: we bypass the conventional supervised fine-tuning (SFT) phase before RL training

builds_on.name: rejection sampling
builds_on.evidence: a multi-stage learning framework that integrates rejection sampling, reinforcement learning, and supervised fine-tuning
